heading: Walyunga National Park vs Walyurin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Walyunga National Park, Western Australia and Walyurin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Walyunga National Park and Walyurin have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Walyunga National Park or Walyurin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Walyunga National Park has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Walyurin scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Walyunga National Park scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Walyurin scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Walyunga National Park or Walyurin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Walyunga National Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
